title: T-046 — UI: TEC-030 Shelf Life Config + override modal
prompt:
# T-046 — UI: TEC-030 Shelf Life Config + override modal

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §9.1, §9.2, §9.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:715-758` (shelf_life_screen); `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:486-513` (shelf_life_override_modal)

## Goal
Shelf life config list + override modal with regulatory presets and date-code preview.

Date code preview component validates date_code_format pattern (YYWW|YYYY-MM-DD|JJWW|YYJJJ|custom regex) and renders sample for today.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/shelf-life/page.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/shelf-life/_components/override-modal.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-030-shelf-life.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- Regulatory dashboard (T-070 docs)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the screen renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:715-758 and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:486-513, then list layout, preset chip list, and override modal field set match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
2. Given date_code_format='YYWW', when previewing today, then a 4-digit YYWW string is shown.
3. Given override modal saved, when API returns 200, then list refreshes.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + format preview.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-030-shelf-life.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow saving shelf_life_mode outside enum.
- Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:715-758` (shelf_life_screen) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:486-513` (shelf_life_override_modal) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
